posts.text: Wouldn't this be the perfect job for Trump's prestigious “Board of Peace” to get this war ended? If it weren't a total phony scam, I mean.

Seriously, what is wrong with this guy?


David Pakman Show (@davidpakmanshow)

✍️ The White House doctors are miracle workers. Got it.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/davidpakmanshow/status/2033639013903487311#m

Look at these absolutely disastrous Senate numbers for Republicans. Trump is to blame, totally optional, but he could be heading towards the most embarrassing final 2 years of any presidency in history.
Top Trump suckup Steven Cheung was WILDLY TRIGGERED by my interview with Governor Gavin Newsom because Newsom called out Stephen Miller

Trump says the Iran war will end when he “feels it in his bones.” Dear God we’re F****ED.

Video

The Strait of Hormuz is TOTALLY OPEN, everything’s FINE. Other than this ONE LITTLE DETAIL about missiles being fired at the boats.

Video

They are now refusing to state the number of American casualties in the Iran war. When regimes do this, it is a HUGE RED FLAG.

Video
I can only imagine that all the terrible things going on are Biden’s fault, Obama’s fault, or maybe even Gavin Newscum’s fault?
So the Trump administration controls Venezuela’s oil as a result of Trump’s kidnapping of Maduro, and that oil supply’s value has exploded thanks to Trump’s optional war with Iran. Got it.

Trump dances like a lunatic for a crowd clapping like trained seals as 8 American servicemembers have been killed and gas prices are up 30% since January thanks to his optional war.

Video

Wow, Trump DOES NOT LIKE being confronted with facts, ESPECIALLY from female reporters.

Video

A completely deranged, swollen, orange, sweaty and disoriented Trump is holding a rally in Kentucky right now for no discernible reason other than absolute panic over the crashing economy, and he can’t even say “Kentucky” correctly.

Video

Trump suddenly doesn't know anything about the US bombing an Iranian  school after previously saying Iran bombed their own school with a  tomahawk missile they acquired from "someone"

Video
This individual REALLY LIKED my interview with Gavin Newsom, but thinks I’m @AaronParnas

Despite Agent Orange claiming the Iran war is “complete,” it appears they’re about to send in ground troops.

Video
Good morning! Another beautiful day under the Affordability President™

Just like in North Korea, you’d BETTER NOT be the first to stop clapping for the Dear Leader. Just keep clapping like a trained seal.

Video

The Peace President has launched a war. The affordability President is seeing historic oil & gas price spikes. The jobs President just lost 92,000 jobs in February. And he might “lose” his own “regime change” war as Iran has just appointed the Ayatollah’s son the new Supreme Leader. Meanwhile everyone’s retirement accounts are crashing.
Could we somehow, I don’t know, blame Biden for this?

It doesn’t seem Trump will “win” this war, and meanwhile he has CRUSHED the economy, with reports that people are screaming about gas prices in the White House. Look for Trump to back off as he fears total destruction in November, of course insisting that “we won the war.”
